AdaptivePageDescription: Notes: Wait for profiles to load before starting mode!
EnablePresetForAutomaticSwitching: Enable this preset for automatic switching. Can be used to exclude games/apps from auto switch.
BasicAdaptiveModeSettingsDescription: Provides the ability to toggle/set adaptive mode targets.
MaxTemperatureLimitToolTip: Controls the max temperature limit adaptive mode is allowed to set
MaxPowerLimitToolTip: Controls the max power limit adpative mode is allowed to set
MaxCurveOptimiserLimitToolTip: Controls the max negative curve optimiser limit adpative mode is allowed to set
AmdApuIGpuTboDescription: Provides the ability to toggle/set Turbo Boost Overdrive iGPU targets.
AmdApuMaxIGpuClockLimitDescription: Controls the maximum iGPU clock speed adaptive mode is allowed to set
AmdApuMinIGpuClockLimitDescription: Controls the minimum iGPU clock speed adaptive mode is allowed to set
AmdApuMinCpuClockLimitDescription: Controls the minimum CPU clock speed at which adaptive mode will start throttling iGPU clocks
AmdApuIGpuTboNote: Notes: Ensure you balance CPU and iGPU clocks out for the best performance!
SuperResolutionDescription: Powered by a customised version of Magpie. Use Alt+F to toggle.
EnableVSyncTooltip: Synchronises capture frame rate to display refresh rate.
AutoRecaptureTooltip: Auto recaptures the previous capture window after focus was lost and restored.
CaptureSharpnessTooltip: Controls UXTU Super Resolution capture image sharpness.
ResolutionScaleTooltip: Controls the resolution of the window being captured. Use application controlled if you do not want UXTU to override the window resolution. Not all applications will be compatible with this mode!
RadeonGraphicsOptionsDescrption: Provides the ability to customise driver graphics options
RadeonAntiLagTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Anti-Lag within drivers on supported hardware.
RadeonSuperResolutionTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Super Resolution within drivers on supported hardware. Also allows you to set a custom sharpness effect.
RadeonBoostTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Boost within drivers on supported hardware. Also allows you to set a minimum resolution in %.
RadeonImageSharpeningTooltip: Enables AMD Radeon™ Image Sharpening within drivers on supported hardware. Allows you to set a custom sharpness effect.
EnhancedSyncTooltip: Enables AMD Enhanced Sync within drivers on supported hardware.
NVIDIAGPUTuningTooltip: Provides the ability to set tune your NVIDIA GPU.
FrequencyAdjustedVoltageLimitTooltip: Controls the maximum voltage your GPU will run within the Frequency/Voltage curve based on clock speed. You can undervolt your NVIDIA GPU by lowering this clock speed below stock and increasing the core clock offset. Start at your GPU's rated boost clock and work down. To reset it, set it to the maximum possible clock the slider allows.
GPUCoreClockOffsetTooltip: Controls the clock offset for your NVIDIA GPU's core clock
GPUMemoryClockTooltip: Controls the clock offset for your NVIDIA GPU's VRAM clock
NVIDIAGPUTuningNote: Warning: We are not liable for any damages to hardware or resulting instabilities caused by adjustment of frequencies and voltages.
ASUSPowerProfileDescription: Provides the ability to set an ASUS power profile. This will override Armoury Crate!
StaticRTSSFrameRateDescription: Provides the ability to set a custom RTSS frame limit.
RTSSFrameLimitTooltip: Controls the set FPS limit in RTSS
BatteryChargePresetDescription: Provides the ability to set a preset to apply when the battery is charging.
ReloadPresetsTooltip: Updates dropdown list with current presets
BatteryDischargePresetDescription: Provides the ability to set a preset to apply when the battery is discharging.
SystemResumePresetDescription: Provides the ability to set a preset to apply on system resume from sleep/hibernation.
CreatedBy: Created by JamesCJ, sbski and ProjectSBC
